---
title: XYNE daily Workload Report — Xyne-Space (2026-04-13)
date: 2026-04-13
cadence: daily
generated_at: 2026-04-13T11:30:50.092Z
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
format: html
project_code: XYNE
project_name: Xyne-Space
---

## Summary

**20 active tickets** in PR Review stage across 15 team members. **11 PAUSED tickets** with breached ETAs (all overdue by 42–106 days). **15 CRITICAL** and **50 HIGH** priority TODO tickets remain unassigned. The most urgent blocker is **PR #4926** which has an ACL Bypass Risk (HIGH SEVERITY) that needs immediate attention. **XYNE-704** (Files tab crashing) is CRITICAL priority and 106+ days overdue — requires escalation. No ETAs are set on any STARTED tickets, making delivery forecasting impossible.

## Team Workload

### Satvik Batra
**Capacity:** MEDIUM (load: 2)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12248 | Add unread DM counter to sidebar | PR Review | — | STARTED |
| XYNE-12231 | Add rename channel option to modal | PR Review | — | ⚠ Build failed |

**Blockers:**
- XYNE-12231: Build failed with 1 test failing (134/135 passed) — needs fix

---

### Siraj Shaik
**Capacity:** MEDIUM (load: 2)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12084 | Message BOT | PR Review | — | STARTED |
| XYNE-10434 | Custom Profile Picture & Editable Display Name | PR Review | — | STARTED |

---

### Abhinav Srivastava
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12074 | For Electron app attachment downloads need an indicator | PR Review | — | STARTED |

**Notes:** QA bot alerts on Apr 13 for `feature/indicatorForDownloadAttachment`. Expert in call analytics work.

---

### Archit Narayan
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12278 | Fix creator unable to leave channel | PR Review | — | STARTED |

**Notes:** Multiple build alerts today (Apr 13) for `fix/devqa-xyne-creatorCanLeave`.

---

### Amitava Chakrabarti
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12292 | Fix mobile grouped attachment grid UI | PR Review | — | STARTED |

**Notes:** Expert in navigation fixes and screenshot-related features. Good candidate for floating tab issues.

---

### Ayush Upadhyay
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11909 | Add notification schedule and default reminder time | PR Review | — | ⚠ Build unstable |

**Blockers:**
- XYNE-11909: Build status UNSTABLE (all 135 tests passed but unstable status)

---

### Shailendra Pratap Singh
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12149 | Optimize zero queries | PR Review | — | STARTED |

---

### Aditya Shekhar Tiwary
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12282 | Drag and Drop to reschedule calls | PR Review | — | STARTED |

**Notes:** Very active with multiple build alerts today for `feature/callCalendar` and `feature/dragndrop`.

---

### Piyush Kesharwani
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12283 | Add board config control for managers | PR Review | — | STARTED |

---

### Rushikesh Wabale
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12275 | Fix overlapping date UI elements | PR Review | — | STARTED |

---

### Yash Gupta
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11583 | Update blocknote and blocknote-layout version | PR Review | — | STARTED |

---

### Ankur Mohan Abraham
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11580 | Fix duplicate pill rendering in new chat | PR Review | — | STARTED |

**Notes:** Mentioned in testing-claw on Apr 13 about agent leaderboard. SBX tracker coordination.

---

### Sheetal Lalwani
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11579 | Dark mode minor fixes for book mark, ticket, channel | PR Review | — | STARTED |

---

### Om Thakur
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-12277 | Change sidebar color to blue | PR Review | — | STARTED |

---

### Shubham Dhamija
**Capacity:** HIGH (load: 1)

**Active Tickets:**

| Ticket | Title | Stage | ETA | Status |
|--------|-------|-------|-----|--------|
| XYNE-11752 | Verify ticket creation feature | PR Review | — | STARTED |

**Notes:** Expert in navigation-related fixes.

---

### Team Members with No STARTED Tickets (Available)
| Name | Notes |
|------|-------|
| Radheyshree Agrawal | Expert in mobile scrolling fixes |
| Navipriya S | Expert in native flows and voice-related work |
| Mayank Bansal | Expert in call scheduling features |
| Mohan Mishra | Expert in icon and screen positioning fixes |
| Sayantan Paul | Expert in Group DM features |
| ANUSHA D | ⚠ Silence risk — 1 STARTED ticket last updated 2+ weeks ago |
| Aryan Pidiha | No STARTED tickets — may need assignment |

## Unassigned Critical Tickets

| Ticket | Title | Priority | Stage |
|--------|-------|----------|-------|
| XYNE-12289 | [Mobile] Fix content jumping while scrolling | CRITICAL | To be Picked Up |
| XYNE-12263 | Voice enrollment flow for speaker identification | CRITICAL | To Do (ETA: 4/15) |
| XYNE-12128 | Implement Call Feature Analytics | CRITICAL | To be Picked Up |
| XYNE-11911 | Update sidebar color to blue for testing | CRITICAL | To be Picked Up |
| XYNE-5643 | Fix ticket details mobile view bug | CRITICAL | To be Picked Up |
| XYNE-5535 | Fix mobile layout for small display settings | CRITICAL | To be Picked Up |
| XYNE-5146 | Fix attachment aspect ratio | CRITICAL | TO_DO |
| XYNE-4389 | Show optional fields in the ticket details page | CRITICAL | TO_DO |
| XYNE-3539 | Persist board filters during ticket navigation | CRITICAL | HUMAN_INTERVENTION |
| XYNE-3540 | Additional Filter Fields in Boards | CRITICAL | TO_DO |
| XYNE-1990 | Implement Kanban view for My tickets | CRITICAL | HUMAN_INTERVENTION |
| XYNE-1972 | Reduce tickets page load latency | CRITICAL | TO_DO |
| XYNE-1314 | Fix scrolling in create new DM user list | CRITICAL | TO_DO |
| XYNE-1313 | Fix mobile scrolling on search screen | CRITICAL | TO_DO |

## Blockers Needing Escalation

- **PR #4926**: ACL Bypass Risk via Nested Queries (HIGH SEVERITY) — reported Apr 12. ACL restrictions only applied to top-level `where` clause. Recommend immediate security review.
- **XYNE-704** (Files tab crashing): CRITICAL priority, 106+ days overdue (ETA: Dec 29, 2025). Stage: AI_PICKED_UP. Needs escalation.
- **XYNE-820** (UI in ticket modal): 97 days overdue. Stage: Deployed but still PAUSED — may need cleanup.
- **XYNE-871** (Drag Drop not working): 96 days overdue. Stage: TO_DO.
- **XYNE-1295** (Thread replies not visible in mobile): 89 days overdue. Stage: AI_PICKED_UP.

## Capacity Summary

| Person | Active | Blocked | Weighted Load | Capacity |
|--------|--------|---------|---------------|----------|
| Satvik Batra | 2 | 0 | 2.0 | MEDIUM |
| Siraj Shaik | 2 | 0 | 2.0 | MEDIUM |
| Abhinav Srivastava | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Archit Narayan | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Amitava Chakrabarti | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Ayush Upadhyay | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Shailendra Pratap Singh | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Aditya Shekhar Tiwary | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Piyush Kesharwani | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Rushikesh Wabale | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Yash Gupta | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Ankur Mohan Abraham | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Sheetal Lalwani | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Om Thakur | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Shubham Dhamija | 1 | 0 | 1.0 | HIGH |
| Radheyshree Agrawal | 0 | 0 | 0.0 | HIGH |
| Navipriya S | 0 | 0 | 0.0 | HIGH |
| Mayank Bansal | 0 | 0 | 0.0 | HIGH |
| Mohan Mishra | 0 | 0 | 0.0 | HIGH |
| Sayantan Paul | 0 | 0 | 0.0 | HIGH |

## Assignment Suggestions

| Ticket | Title | Priority | Suggested Assignee | Capacity | Rationale |
|--------|-------|----------|--------------------|----------|-----------|
| XYNE-12289 | [Mobile] Fix content jumping while scrolling | CRITICAL | Radheyshree Agrawal | HIGH (load: 0) | Expert: completed XYNE-706 (similar mobile scroll freeze issue) |
| XYNE-12263 | Voice enrollment flow for speaker identification | CRITICAL | Navipriya S | HIGH (load: 0) | Expert: completed XYNE-9996, XYNE-5290, XYNE-11566 (native flows and voice work) |
| XYNE-12128 | Implement Call Feature Analytics | CRITICAL | Abhinav Srivastava | HIGH (load: 1.0) | Expert: completed XYNE-8879 (call analytics bug fix) |
| XYNE-12299 | Fix postbox icon flash on back navigation | HIGH | Amitava Chakrabarti | HIGH (load: 1.0) | Expert: completed XYNE-7035 (ticket navigation fixes) |
| XYNE-12295 | Fix screenshot share focus issue in floating tab | HIGH | Amitava Chakrabarti | HIGH (load: 1.0) | Expert: completed XYNE-11759 (screenshot workflow features) |
| XYNE-12290 | Fix WFH status display in group DMs | HIGH | Sayantan Paul | HIGH (load: 0) | Expert: completed XYNE-8868, XYNE-7558 (Group DM features) |

> These are suggestions only. This agent does not modify tickets.

## Process Improvements Recommended

1. **Set ETAs on all STARTED tickets** — Currently none have ETAs, making delivery forecasting impossible.
2. **Review PAUSED tickets** — 11 tickets with breached ETAs need triage. Some may be stale (e.g., XYNE-5794 shows "Merged" but still PAUSED).
3. **Address XYNE-704 urgently** — CRITICAL ticket 106+ days overdue needs immediate attention.
4. **Security review for PR #4926** — ACL Bypass Risk is a HIGH SEVERITY blocker affecting xyne-spaces.
